---
id: submit-expense
title: "Submit an expense for approval"
description: "Submit an expense for approval. Expense must be in draft status and have at least one receipt attached."
sidebar_label: "Submit an expense for approval"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/fjord-expense-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Submit an expense for approval"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/expenses/{expense_id}/submit"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Submit an expense for approval. Expense must be in draft status and have at least one receipt attached.

  id={"request"}
